tool_assumptions: All audited theme selectors were read from src/styles/theme/base.css and src/styles/theme/variants.css.
Contrast ratio uses WCAG relative luminance and source-over alpha compositing before luminance is computed.
Theme-pair checks assume normal text thresholds unless a component explicitly renders large text.
Non-solid backgrounds, images, gradients, and shadows are outside this token-matrix sweep and remain manual-review items.

pairings_audited.note: Default page text on page background.
Primary button text on primary surface.
Sidebar body text on sidebar surface.
Sidebar primary action text on sidebar primary surface.
Sidebar accent text on sidebar accent surface.
Muted text directly on page background.
Muted text directly on card surface.
Generic page text token reused on card surface.
